name: Whipped Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together 1 cup of sugar and 2 tablespoons of softened butter until combined.
2. Add the yolks of 2 eggs that have been beaten well to the mixture.
3. Gradually add 4 tablespoons of milk and desired flavoring.
4. Mix 1 teaspoon of cream of tartar with half a teaspoon of baking soda in a separate bowl, then sift this mixture into the batter lightly.
5. Pour the batter into a small greased pan and bake until set.
6. Once cooled, prepare 1/2 pint of sweetened whipped cream flavored as desired.
7. Spread the whipped cream over the cake while it is still fresh.
